Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Sources - Don't Make Me Think — Steve Krug - The Design of Everyday Things — Don Norman - Laws of UX — Jon Yablonski Use quando o pedido envolver: cognitive load, mental model, ux architecture, hick law, miller law, jakob law, don't make me think.
---

# UX Cognitive Architecture

## Stack alvo
- Next.js 15+ App Router
- React 19+
- TanStack Query
- shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4
- Monorepo (apps + packages)

## Workflow
1. Diagnosticar carga cognitiva by tela — multiplos CTAs, opcoes excessivas, ambiguidade.
2. Reduzir opcoes simultaneas e usar progressao by etapas (Lei of Hick).
3. Agrupar informactions in blocos semanticos coerentes (Lei of Miller).
4. Garantir acao principal inequivoca e estado atual da jornada claro.
5. Otimizar pico emocional e final of jornada (Peak-End Rule).

## Saída esperada
1. Diagnostico of carga cognitiva by tela.
2. Plano of simplificacao (remocao, reagrupamento, sequenciamento).
3. Revisao of microcopys of orientacao e feedback.
4. Checklist of previsibilidade of interacao.
